title: Cataclysmic Crab Spawn
description: Adds a Summoning Item for the Amethyst Crab from L_Ender's Cataclysm!
body:
**- -Requires L_Ender's Cataclysm- -**  
**THANK YOU FOR 400k DOWNLOADS!**
## Cataclysmic Crab Spawn
Have you ever been playing L_Ender's Cataclysm and wondered, _"This Amethyst Crab is way too hard to find, I've been searching forever!"_  ...No? Well, I did, which is why this mod exists!
## Suspicious Looking Crab
The only feature added in this mod is the Suspicious Looking Crab, a craftable item used to summon the Amethyst Crab!
![Suspicious Looking Crab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9afa2fd2f27492b3bbac39275bfa221e3b817c46.png)
